title: Stop summoning locals over re-posting of separatist Geelani’s video on Urdu language: PDP’s Iltija Mufti
description: “I take full responsibility for a recent video on Urdu that I tweeted. It’s come to my notice that others who shared it are being summoned by the Cyber Police (of the J&K Police), says PDP leader Mufti Iltija
